steps.title: Identify what the passage covers
steps.content: The passage moves chronologically from the Cafe's founding in 1973 through its growth, relocation, and expansion, ending with what it “continues to” do today—foster Nuyorican talent. This comprehensive arc from origin to present-day mission is the decisive signal.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice D states “provide an overview of the founding and mission,” which directly captures the passage's arc from origin (1973) to present-day function (fostering talent). The other choices either narrow to single elements (A to motivation, C to expansion) or introduce scope not addressed (B to NYC culture broadly), rather than providing an overview. That matches choice D — D is correct.
